name: case-management-app

scripts.electron-dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.package: npm run build && electron-packager . "ProjectFlow" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --prune=true --asar --app-copyright="Case Management App"
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run package
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run package

description: A desktop case management app with dark purple UI.
